title: Nyemo Cold Snap Hits
lead: A severe cold snap has struck Nyemo with a Z-Score of -3.14. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Nyemo are extreme, with a significant impact on the region. 
 The cold snap has resulted in a high Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 12.0 GG, while the Cooling Degree Days (CDD) remain at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 83%, and the wind speed is moderate at 4.0 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures immediately to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
